name: greenmart-platform
description: Health & Beauty E-Commerce Core Platform - 모노레포 기반 카탈로그/커스터머/인벤토리/세틀먼트 통합 관리 플랫폼

scripts.dev: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/api
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/web/.next apps/api/dist packages/shared/dist
